title: Could the Fruit of Knowledge power Eva 01s Berserk
display_title: Could the Fruit of Knowledge power Eva 01s Berserk
wikitext:
[]: Could the Fruit of Knowledge power Eva-01's Berserk?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Fri Sep 04, 2009 11:05 pm Eva-01 is the Eva with the most rampages out of all the Evas, and was created from Lillith, while the others were all Adam-based. My question is: could Eva-01 have inherited Lillith's Fruit, and therefore be able to move itself without a power source? The others couldn't do it without something powering them or the influence of a pilot. To wit: Eva-00: Went berserk twice, but shut down after the power cable was detached and the battery died. Eva-02: Only once, and that was because of Asuka's influence. Eva-03:Bardiel's possession mirrors an Eva's rampage, and they even try the same method to stop him before Bardi uses his S2 Engine to blast his way out. Eva Series:Their behavior in battle reminds me of berserk too: they act almost animalistically, they growl and snarl, and then there's the whole mauling Eva-02 thing. However, they were operating with both the dummy system, and they possessed manmade S2 engines. Thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Sep 05, 2009 4:39 am I always assumed that the reasons Eva-01 went berserk so many times lie more in Yui's character than any physical differences between the Evas. But the fact that Eva-01 is derived from Lilith might make it easier for a Lilim soul (Yui) to manipulate it than an Adam based Eva, since Lilith is closer to "classic" humans than Adam. She's more... compatible, perhaps? Anyway, it is pretty hard to define what the "Fruit of Wisdom" is in the Evaverse. It is something that is connected to human intelligence, so i don't see it as a power source for berserking. 


[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 05, 2009 2:47 pm The Fruit of Knowledge doesn't allow for those sorts of boons, or humanity wouldn't need to eat or sleep. Yui goes beserk so much because she's a big ol' Mama Bear (and her being the only resident soul of the three main Evas that isn't split or psychotic probably helps). She doesn't gain the ability to ignore energy requirement until she devours an S2 Engine. Before then, she was probably, like, eating her own cells or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Sat Sep 05, 2009 4:25 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Before then, she was probably, like, eating her own cells or something.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 05, 2009 5:55 pm Maybe so, but the energy to act out on that willpower has to come from somewhere. Either from stored lipids or from soul magic.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat Sep 05, 2009 6:54 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Maybe so, but the energy to act out on that willpower has to come from somewhere. Either from stored lipids or from soul magic.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Sep 12, 2009 10:24 pm Unit-01 was the first Eva to become "aware" of itself, according to Ritsuko in 19. The battery power is most likely purely electrical, but if the Eva were aware of itself then it's biological components could act on their own without battery power. It's not explained how Unit-01 goes from her bloody feast in 19 to being contained in 20, but it could have been that the resident soul willingly shut down the Eva. Unit-02 also acted without battery power in EoE, based on probably both Asuka and Kyoko's willpower. For Unit-00, a lot could be speculated as to why it stopped pounding the wall when the battery power went out. But it may be because the resident soul (be that 1/2 of Lilith or whatever) was not fully aware of itself and when the power cut off it gave up. Or (this is just me babbling on randomly now) there was a struggle going on between the Adam-Cloned body and the soul of Lilith, and when the power gave up the Adam body lost and the Lilith soul wasn't fully aware of itself to take over the body, so it ended there. I don't know, this is just a thought. xP
